title: Kconfig help text: missing implementation reference for CCP16
description: The new LICHEN_LINK_CCP16_LOAD_BALANCING config help references DEFCON notes but the feature has no code yet in link layer (no lichen_link_ccp16* functions). P2 correctness. Tagged codereview. Discovered from project-LICHEN-h11w after first edit.
close_reason: Fixed in Kconfig update and 3 codereview passes complete. Help text now references DEFCON density notes per h11w.
